testcase.name: basicPutAndGet
testcase.system-out: 18:11:11.538 [main] INFO com.kvstore.wal.WALReplay -- No WAL file found at data/test.wal, starting fresh 18:11:11.541 [main] INFO com.kvstore.core.InMemoryStore -- Recovery complete: 0 WAL entries applied 18:11:11.542 [main] INFO com.kvstore.wal.WAL -- WAL opened at data/test.wal 18:11:11.543 [main] INFO com.kvstore.core.InMemoryStore -- InMemoryStore ready, 0 keys loaded 18:11:11.544 [main] DEBUG com.kvstore.wal.WAL -- WAL append lsn=1 op=PUT key=k1 18:11:11.544 [main] DEBUG com.kvstore.core.InMemoryStore -- PUT key=k1 valueSize=5 18:11:11.544 [main] DEBUG com.kvstore.core.InMemoryStore -- GET key=k1 -> HIT 18:11:11.545 [main] DEBUG com.kvstore.core.InMemoryStore -- GET key=k1 -> HIT 18:11:11.545 [main] INFO com.kvstore.wal.WAL -- WAL closed

testcase.name: deleteShouldReturnEmpty
testcase.system-out: 18:11:11.551 [main] INFO com.kvstore.wal.WALReplay -- No WAL file found at data/test.wal, starting fresh 18:11:11.551 [main] INFO com.kvstore.core.InMemoryStore -- Recovery complete: 0 WAL entries applied 18:11:11.551 [main] INFO com.kvstore.wal.WAL -- WAL opened at data/test.wal 18:11:11.551 [main] INFO com.kvstore.core.InMemoryStore -- InMemoryStore ready, 0 keys loaded 18:11:11.551 [main] DEBUG com.kvstore.wal.WAL -- WAL append lsn=1 op=PUT key=k1 18:11:11.551 [main] DEBUG com.kvstore.core.InMemoryStore -- PUT key=k1 valueSize=5 18:11:11.551 [main] DEBUG com.kvstore.wal.WAL -- WAL append lsn=2 op=DELETE key=k1 18:11:11.551 [main] DEBUG com.kvstore.core.InMemoryStore -- DELETE key=k1 18:11:11.551 [main] DEBUG com.kvstore.core.InMemoryStore -- GET key=k1 -> MISS 18:11:11.551 [main] INFO com.kvstore.wal.WAL -- WAL closed

testcase.name: crashRecoveryShouldRestoreState
testcase.system-out: 18:11:11.553 [main] INFO com.kvstore.wal.WALReplay -- No WAL file found at data/test.wal, starting fresh 18:11:11.553 [main] INFO com.kvstore.core.InMemoryStore -- Recovery complete: 0 WAL entries applied 18:11:11.553 [main] INFO com.kvstore.wal.WAL -- WAL opened at data/test.wal 18:11:11.553 [main] INFO com.kvstore.core.InMemoryStore -- InMemoryStore ready, 0 keys loaded 18:11:11.553 [main] DEBUG com.kvstore.wal.WAL -- WAL append lsn=1 op=PUT key=name 18:11:11.553 [main] DEBUG com.kvstore.core.InMemoryStore -- PUT key=name valueSize=3 18:11:11.553 [main] DEBUG com.kvstore.wal.WAL -- WAL append lsn=2 op=PUT key=goal 18:11:11.553 [main] DEBUG com.kvstore.core.InMemoryStore -- PUT key=goal valueSize=5 18:11:11.553 [main] DEBUG com.kvstore.wal.WAL -- WAL append lsn=3 op=DELETE key=goal 18:11:11.554 [main] DEBUG com.kvstore.core.InMemoryStore -- DELETE key=goal 18:11:11.554 [main] INFO com.kvstore.wal.WAL -- WAL closed 18:11:11.555 [main] INFO com.kvstore.wal.WALReplay -- WAL replay complete: 3 entries recovered, 0 skipped 18:11:11.555 [main] INFO com.kvstore.core.InMemoryStore -- Recovery complete: 3 WAL entries applied 18:11:11.555 [main] INFO com.kvstore.wal.WAL -- WAL opened at data/test.wal 18:11:11.555 [main] INFO com.kvstore.core.InMemoryStore -- InMemoryStore ready, 2 keys loaded 18:11:11.555 [main] DEBUG com.kvstore.core.InMemoryStore -- GET key=name -> HIT 18:11:11.555 [main] DEBUG com.kvstore.core.InMemoryStore -- GET key=goal -> MISS 18:11:11.556 [main] INFO com.kvstore.wal.WAL -- WAL closed
